---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new platform, action, or capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**The thing you want**
e.g., "Add Pinterest adapter" / "Support video uploads in YouTube adapter" / "Add `dm()` action to all platforms"

**Why**
What problem does this solve? Who benefits?

**Sketch (optional)**
If you've thought about the API shape, paste a snippet.
